title: oxera robusta
intro: Oxera robusta, also known as the robust oxeye or robust oxeye, is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Pacific Island medicine, where it is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oxera robusta include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Oxera robusta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
